_comment: Copy this file to web/test/seed-credentials.local.json and fill in your values from the browser's localStorage. The .local.json file is gitignored. Once filled in, the Vite dev server injects these values into the page on load so the simulator (which has its own WebView with empty localStorage) can authenticate without re-entering credentials. Run: cp web/test/seed-credentials.template.json web/test/seed-credentials.local.json
